description: Hailing from the UK, Phoenix's star power shines through in his fighting style, igniting the battlefield with flash and flare.

abilities.abilityDescription: Deploys a wall of fire that blocks vision and damages anyone passing through it. It also heals Phoenix if he stands in it.
Throws a curved flare that detonates into a brilliant light, temporarily blinding all players who see it.
Throws a fireball that creates a lingering fire zone on the ground, damaging enemies and healing Phoenix.

ultimate: Run It Back: Places a marker at Phoenix's location. While active, dying or allowing the timer to expire will respawn him at that location with full health.

description: The stronghold of China, Sage creates safety for herself and her team by reviving fallen allies and warding off aggressive pushes.

abilities.abilityDescription: Deploys a solid, four-segmented wall that can be used to block paths or boost players to higher vantage points.
Throws an orb that breaks into a field of ice, slowing and making noise when players walk across it.
Heals an ally or Sage herself over a short duration.

ultimate: Resurrection: Targets a fallen ally's corpse to bring them back to life with full health after a brief delay.

description: Born from the eternal winter of Russia's tundra, Sova tracks, finds, and eliminates enemies with ruthless efficiency.

abilities.abilityDescription: Deploys a pilotable drone that can fire a marking dart to reveal the location of any enemy hit.
Fires an explosive bolt that emits a damaging pulse of energy upon impact.
Fires a bolt that deploys a sonar emitter, revealing the location of nearby enemies caught in its line of sight.

ultimate: Hunter's Fury: Fires up to three long-range energy blasts that pierce through walls and reveal any hit enemies.
